perspective: orthographic top-down rooms with readable frontal wall, door, window and furniture faces

palette.interior: desaturated blue-green, walnut, bone and candle amber
palette.garden: yew green, wet stone and sea mist

pixelLanguage.shading: two value steps plus one event highlight
pixelLanguage.outlines: dark selective outlines, never uniform vector contours
pixelLanguage.dithering: sparse ordered clusters only in fog and aged walls
pixelLanguage.alpha: binary transparency for sprites and props

detailDensity.environment: 30-45 percent of visible room area carries authored furniture, trim, material or landmark detail
detailDensity.character: hair, costume collar, body proportion and posture remain identifiable at native scale
detailDensity.interaction: critical prop has silhouette and warm one-pixel marker distinct from decoration

characterIdentity.grace: tall black high-collar dress, severe bun, straight posture
characterIdentity.anne: blue-gray dress, dark ribbon, forward posture
characterIdentity.mills: silver hair, black dress, pale apron triangle

environmentMaterials: heavy curtains and empty brass hooks

lighting.base: low slate ambient with small amber lamps
lighting.overlap: cool violet double image without blur
lighting.daylight: aligned warm shafts with preserved navigation contrast
lighting.ending: gold light becomes safe and removes hostile edge contrast

prohibitedDrift: flat checkerboard floors as final art
concept collage used as the only production asset
